purpose: Temporary Phase-2 baseline and GCN-LSTM implementation while real adjacent-road camera and sensor coverage is unavailable.

approved_forecast_inputs.scope: development, contract tests, baseline and GCN-LSTM smoke training only

prohibited_forecast_inputs.reason: vision images are not 5-minute network time series
annual US CO2 inventory is not ambient Vietnam sensor data
frames must be converted to approved 5-minute aggregates before forecast use

surrogate_policy.reason: No calibrated SUMO scenario dataset is available
